title: The Case of the Henderson Bins
caption: By evening the regulars had arrived, and Detective Park had a case to present. Three weeks of surveillance. Printed photographs. The suspect: a large tabby cat, caught on camera with complete composure, knocking over the Hendersons' rubbish bins. He laid out the evidence with the gravity of a man who had cracked something important. It was the first time Chloe had laughed since arriving. It felt like something loosening.
story_notes: Detective Park introduced. His first case: the Henderson bin cat. Chloe laughs for the first time since arriving.
